'''鈭歠-t-m-ng''' ('''kafatmengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lull|lull]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lull|lull]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-t-m-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kafatmengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifatmengoko|thifatmengoko]] || [[word:jifatmengoko|jifatmengoko]] || [[word:shifatmengoko|shifatmengoko]] || [[word:kifatmengoko|kifatmengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufatmengoko|thuthufatmengoko]] || [[word:jujufatmengoko|jujufatmengoko]] || [[word:shushufatmengoko|shushufatmengoko]] || [[word:kukufatmengoko|kukufatmengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufatmengoko|thufatmengoko]] || [[word:jufatmengoko|jufatmengoko]] || [[word:shufatmengoko|shufatmengoko]] || [[word:kufatmengoko|kufatmengoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofatmengoko|thothofatmengoko]] || [[word:jojofatmengoko|jojofatmengoko]] || [[word:shoshofatmengoko|shoshofatmengoko]] || [[word:kokofatmengoko|kokofatmengoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofatmengoko|thofatmengoko]] || [[word:jofatmengoko|jofatmengoko]] || [[word:shofatmengoko|shofatmengoko]] || [[word:kofatmengoko|kofatmengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fatmengoko|th忙fatmengoko]] || [[word:j忙fatmengoko|j忙fatmengoko]] || [[word:sh忙fatmengoko|sh忙fatmengoko]] || [[word:k忙fatmengoko|k忙fatmengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafatmengoko|thathafatmengoko]] || [[word:jajafatmengoko|jajafatmengoko]] || [[word:shashafatmengoko|shashafatmengoko]] || [[word:kakafatmengoko|kakafatmengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafatmengoko|thafatmengoko]] || [[word:jafatmengoko|jafatmengoko]] || [[word:shafatmengoko|shafatmengoko]] || [[word:kafatmengoko|kafatmengoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
